title: CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS - 211info
text: DECONSTRUCTING THE MENTAL HEALTH SYSTEM CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of mental health providers that identify as being a member of underserved populations. Also provides resources for providers and a therapy and wellness program. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: Varies by provider DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: Varies by provider AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Mental Health Issues Therapy Referrals * African American Community Therapy Referrals * Arab Community Therapy Referrals * Asian Community Therapy Referrals * Hispanic/Latino Community Therapy Referrals * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Therapy Referrals * Native American Community Therapy Referrals * Pacific Oceanic Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
